violations.text: Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the back storage area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Establishment was observed with an excess of product. Back rooms must be kept clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2024

Pallets of water were observed stored on the side of the loading dock. Establishment must bring water inside of the store. Management stated water pallets would be moved in tomorrow. Water covered with tarps until moved into the store. New Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the back storage area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Establishment was observed with an excess of product. Back rooms must be kept clean. New Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2024
